header.subtitle: Local sync agent
header.generalSubtitle: Secure connection to your SpendWise account
header.generalSubtitleNamed: Hi {0} · connected to your SpendWise account

host.generalBody: This computer checks and runs only your own sync jobs. The private key stays here.
host.generalNote: Leave the service on for background checks, or check manually any time.
host.defaultBody: Hi {0}, the Windows Worker runs here and takes care of SpendWise syncs.
host.defaultNote: When this computer is online, it checks sync requests and runs the ones allowed now.

status.hintStopped: Start the Worker so it checks SpendWise every 30 minutes.
status.hintRunning: The Worker is running in the background and checks sync requests every 30 minutes.
status.hintBusy: The Worker is working now. If a browser opens, keep it open.
status.hintBusyElapsed: Working for {0} · live status from the agent
status.personalHintStopped: Start automatic sync so this computer checks for new requests.
status.personalHintRunning: Sync is active in the background; you can close this window and carry on.
status.personalHintBusy: A sync is running now. If a browser opens, keep it open.

result.failure: Last sync failed - see the log
result.saving: Read {0} account(s) and {1} transaction(s) · saving now
result.locked: Another agent run is already active
result.stoppedAfterCurrent: Service stopped; the current sync will continue.

model.title: What actually happens
model.browserBody: The browser opens here and bank login stays local.
model.reportBody: No accounts or transactions are saved on disk.

buttons.rawDebugOn: ● RAW debug active — click to stop

tips.startService: Start the Worker that checks SpendWise every 30 minutes.
tips.stopService: Stop future automatic checks. An active sync is not killed.
tips.checkNow: One-time check: if a sync request is allowed to run, the Worker syncs now.
tips.clean: Kill stuck agent or browser processes and remove a stale lock.
tips.personalStartService: Start automatic checks for your own sync requests.
tips.personalStopService: Pause future automatic checks. An active sync will finish normally.
tips.personalCheckNow: Check now for a sync request in your SpendWise account.

startup.label: Launch automatically with Windows
startup.interval: The Worker checks SpendWise every {0} minutes. A stuck run is cancelled after {1} minutes.
startup.personalInterval: SpendWise checks for your sync requests from this computer every {0} minutes.

tray.stuckBody: A sync got stuck and was cancelled after {0} minutes.

pairing.title: Your computer is almost connected
pairing.body: Paste the code shown in SpendWise under Bank Sync → Agent → ‘My own computer’.
pairing.errorGeneric: Couldn't connect — check the code and try again
pairing.help: This is a one-time code. After pairing, only this computer runs your syncs.
